description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake with a smooth white buttercream exterior, accented by a subtle blue band around its circumference. The cake is decorated with geometric blue sugar shards, metallic gold spherical confections, and a chocolate drip effect on one side. A painted edible image of praying hands is featured on the side, adding a personalized touch. The cake sits on a faux wood-grain round board, which is placed atop a larger yellow square mat. A single tall candle with a blue base and the inscription 'HBD MORTZA' in white letters are also present on the board, indicating a celebratory occasion.
description: A round, white buttercream cake with blue accents, gold spheres, chocolate drip, and geometric sugar shards, displayed on a wood-grain board with a candle and birthday inscription.
description_view_0: Front view shows the smooth white cake with blue sugar shards and gold spheres on top, and a single tall candle on the left.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the chocolate drip, gold spheres, and the 'HBD MORTZA' inscription on the board.
description_view_2: The painted praying hands image is visible, along with the blue geometric shards and gold spheres, and the full birthday inscription.
description_view_3: Back view shows the plain white and blue buttercream surface, blue shards, and gold spheres, with minimal decoration.
